goal: Agents offload low-risk work including small one-shots (summarize/translate/vision/code) via a 5-step portable flow, with verifiable worker output.

primaryKpi.name: suite_pass_rate
primaryKpi.servesGoal: Small-task + translate surfaces without regressing safety

guardrails.name: think_flag_safe
guardrails.rule: --think=false must not be parsed as model name; equals form accepted

guardrails.name: not_setup_locked
guardrails.rule: no hard-coded gemma/qwen defaults as requirements

budget: static+script always; live ≤25 calls if Ollama up; skip qwen2.5:32b
decisionRule: ACCEPT if suite_pass_rate >= 0.85 AND hardFails=0 AND guardrails pass; else CONTINUE
